caption: A young girl stands in front of a bright, illustrated backdrop featuring a yellow sun, a stylized tree, and green hills. She is wearing a green sleeveless dress with a decorative gold collar and a black border at the hem. In the scene, three small, colorful cartoon birds—two blue and one yellow—are positioned to her left. The text "Early age learning" appears in blue at the top of the frames, accompanied by a small logo of a blue bird. As the sequence progresses, the girl performs various hand gestures; she starts with her arms slightly raised, then drops them to her sides, brings her hands together in front of her waist, and finally raises her arms above her head. Yellow Marathi text appears at the bottom of the screen, changing from "बघू, बघू" to "कडनें पावत पसरून देऊ, वात्याच्या गातीत, क".
